title: tomoxis odorata
intro: Tomoxis odorata, also known as Mexican prickly poppy, is a perennial plant species native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Tomoxis odorata include relief from pain, inflammation, and infection, as well as potential use in treating conditions such as acne and eczema. Tomoxis odorata is often prepared into herbal teas, ointments, and salves, which are used topically to apply the plant's medicinal properties directly to affected areas.
